user.title: Atmoce Gateway — Connection
user.description: Enter the local IP address of your Atmoce Gateway (MC100 / MG100).

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.description: Only change the Modbus Slave ID if your gateway was configured with a non-default value. Leave it at 1 if unsure.

battery.title: Battery model
battery.description: Select your battery model. This sets the correct power limits.

cloud.title: Atmoce Cloud (optional)
cloud.description: Cloud is used as a read-only fallback if Modbus is unavailable. Leave disabled if you only use local access.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Atmoce gateway. Check the IP address and that Modbus TCP is enabled.
error.cloud_credentials_required: Both app_key and app_secret are required when Cloud fallback is enabled.
Both app_key and app_secret are required when Cloud fallback is enabled.
